problem id: 034930e2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2)

examples:
  10010110 -> 01011010
  10010001 -> 01000110
  10100001 -> 10000110
  11010000 -> 01000011
  10001000 -> 00100010
  11110001 -> 11000111
  01100001 -> 10000101
  00000001 -> 00000100
  00101010 -> 10101000

query: 11000101
predicted answer: 00010111
